case_title: ANDREW COLLIER VS. STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE,INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM DEFENDANT STEVEN CHENG, OWNER FILED BY COLLIER, ANDREW STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE,INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE,INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) STEVEN CHENG, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE,INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLIER, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE,INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,312.63 FILED BY COLLIER, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLIER, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE,INC. $25.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $70.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LY. PLAINTIFF ANDREW COLLIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN CHENG, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
